query:
-- 创建/更新管理员测试账号
INSERT INTO users (name, password, phone, nickname, email, role, isActive, openId, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('test_admin', '$2b$10$vRA6wEXAZRycoD8JOGr/A.sKR4ReLtVbfpF4iheXzZ.yjId9kL/AS', '13800138001', '测试管理员', 'admin@test.com', 'admin', true, 'test_admin_1738480000000', NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 
  password = '$2b$10$vRA6wEXAZRycoD8JOGr/A.sKR4ReLtVbfpF4iheXzZ.yjId9kL/AS',
  phone = '13800138001',
  nickname = '测试管理员',
  email = 'admin@test.com',
  role = 'admin',
  isActive = true,
  updatedAt = NOW();

-- 创建/更新普通用户测试账号
